title: Paris
text: Paris is the capital and most populous city of France. ==Understand== Paris is one of the most visited cities in the world. ==See== ===Eiffel Tower=== The iconic symbol of Paris. Built for the 1889 World's Fair. ===Louvre Museum=== The world's largest art museum and a historic monument in Paris. Home to the Mona Lisa. ==Do== ===Seine Cruise=== Take a boat tour along the Seine river to see the city from a different perspective.

title: London
text: London is the capital and largest city of England and the United Kingdom. ==Understand== A global city with history stretching back to Roman times. ==See== ===Big Ben=== The nickname for the Great Bell of the striking clock at the north end of the Palace of Westminster. ===British Museum=== Dedicated to human history, art and culture. ==Do== ===West End Theatre=== Catch a world-class play or musical in London's West End.

title: Bali
text: Bali is a province of Indonesia and the westernmost of the Lesser Sunda Islands. ==Understand== Known for its forested volcanic mountains, iconic rice paddies, beaches and coral reefs. ==See== ===Uluwatu Temple=== A Balinese sea temple in Uluwatu. ===Sacred Monkey Forest Sanctuary=== A nature reserve and Hindu temple complex in Ubud. ==Do== ===Surfing=== Bali is a world-famous surfing destination with spots for all levels.
